systemSnapshot.title: System Snapshot
systemSnapshot.content: The CodeWorld Observatory is operating in Phase 8 (Experiment Memory). No branch simulation sessions have been recorded and no benchmark harness evaluations have been performed.

recentExperiments.title: Recent Experiments
recentExperiments.content: No simulation sessions have been recorded in the persistent ledger.

preferredBranchTrends.title: Preferred Branch Trends
preferredBranchTrends.content: Insufficient data to determine dominant branching strategies. The system has not yet accumulated enough benchmark or simulation sessions to derive strategy preferences.

governanceConstraintPatterns.title: Governance Constraint Patterns
governanceConstraintPatterns.content: No governance blockers have been recorded. Either the system has no simulation data, or all branches have passed governance checks without triggering constraint events.

calibrationTrendSummary.title: Longitudinal Calibration Trend
calibrationTrendSummary.content: No prediction-reality comparisons have been recorded. Calibration trend cannot be derived. Not enough data points to establish a structural baseline.

evidenceSufficiencySummary.title: Evidence Sufficiency
evidenceSufficiencySummary.content: No benchmark sessions have been evaluated. Evidence sufficiency cannot be assessed.

simulationGapNotes.title: Simulation Gap Notes
simulationGapNotes.content: No simulation sessions have been recorded — the entire simulation surface is unmapped. Prediction-reality calibration loop has insufficient evidence for trend derivation. Cross-module runtime event bubbling cannot be captured by static AST proxy layers. Next phases must address implicit event bus routing.

architecturalInterpretation.title: Architectural Interpretation of SE-JEPA
architecturalInterpretation.content: CodeWorld Observatory implements an abstract operational prototype of Yann LeCun's SE-JEPA model. Instead of continuous representation vectors, it uses discrete software AST proxies (structural profiles, dependency graphs, stability radii). This demonstrates that the core principles of Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture — specifically planning over abstract world-states rather than autoregressive token output — can fundamentally derisk autonomous software agents. The current prototype remains structural and heuristic; no learned connectionist model is active.

knownLimits.title: Known Limitations
knownLimits.content: The current iteration acts as a purely structural constraint system. It lacks a learned connectionist model for continuous state updates and relies on explicit boundary detection. Therefore, its 'predictions' are deterministic calculations of scope radius rather than probabilistically learned world dynamics. Strategy trend analysis is derived from branch-ID heuristics and may not reflect true intervention intent without richer metadata.

nextResearchPriorities.title: Next Research Priorities
nextResearchPriorities.content: Phase 9 must focus on publishing an exportable narrative of these findings, improving the visibility of the empirical calibration deltas, and packaging the framework for external validation. Additional priorities: expanding the observation encoder to capture cross-module event bus routing, enriching branch metadata for more accurate strategy classification, and establishing a reproducible artifact export format.
